domain: Premium B2B Loose Diamond Stock Showcase

theme_archetype.description: Cinematic dark mode, heavy focus on expensive textures, lighting, and negative space. High contrast for readability of B2B data tables, paired with dramatic product presentation for marketing.

rules: Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for dense body text; use secondary (#A1A1AA) to reduce eye strain.
Use tabular-nums for all diamond specifications (Carat, Price) to ensure vertical alignment in tables.

spacing_and_layout.marketing_pages: Generous spacing. Use p-12 to p-24 for section padding. Embrace asymmetrical bento grids for featured stones.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_stock_page: Dense control-room layout. Use h-screen with a sticky header. Sidebar width: 320px. Content area: responsive table with sticky header.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A84C] text-[#07090F] font-semibold hover:bg-[#D4B86A] transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border border-[#C9A84C] text-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#C9A84C]/10 transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white font-semibold hover:bg-[#1DA851] transition-all flex items-center gap-2 rounded-sm px-6 py-3

inputs_and_filters.style: bg-[#121622] border-[#27272A] text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C9A84C] rounded-sm
inputs_and_filters.sliders: Use Shadcn slider customized with gold/rose-gold/electric-blue track depending on the active category.

data_table.header: sticky top-0 bg-[#121622] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 font-semibold border-b border-[#27272A] z-10

argyle_cards.pink: relative group overflow-hidden border border-[#B76E79]/20 bg-[#121622] p-6 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(183,110,121,0.15)]
argyle_cards.blue: relative group overflow-hidden border border-[#4FC3F7]/20 bg-[#121622] p-6 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(79,195,247,0.15)]

components_strategy.enquiry_basket: Fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-[#1A1F2E]/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#C9A84C]/30 shadow-2xl rounded-lg p-6 w-80 max-h-[60vh] flex flex-col

animations_and_motion.hero_particles: Implement 'tsparticles' with slow-moving, tiny, high-opacity white/gold dots simulating diamond dust.
animations_and_motion.logo_refraction: Use Framer Motion to sweep a linear gradient (light beam) across the text 'Rainbow Star' continuously.
animations_and_motion.argyle_glow_border: Use a rotating conic-gradient mask via CSS or Framer Motion to simulate a tracing light beam around the border of Argyle diamond tiles.
animations_and_motion.page_transitions: Soft opacity fade-in (duration: 0.6s) with a slight upward translation (y: 10).

hero_background.alt: Luxury modern corporate glass facade dark
hero_background.usage: Use as a deep, subtle background for the contact or about pages with heavy black overlay.

loose_diamond_1.alt: Sparkling loose white diamond on black
loose_diamond_1.usage: Hero or featured standard diamond section.

loose_diamonds_pile.usage: Background texture for the CVD diamonds section or homepage.

argyle_pink_abstract.usage: Hero background for the Argyle Pink sub-page.

argyle_blue_abstract.usage: Hero background or feature for Argyle Blue sub-page.

libraries_and_tools: shadcn/ui (Tailwind-based customized components for filters, select, slider, dialogs)

rules: All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='nav-home-link', data-testid='add-to-enquiry-btn', data-testid='whatsapp-submit-btn', data-testid='filter-carat-slider').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global background is set to the dark navy/charcoal base (#07090F). Do not use pure white anywhere except text.

Implement a complex layout: Marketing pages (Home, About) get asymmetrical, high-margin designs. The Stock page gets a dense, control-room style UI taking up full viewport height (sidebar + data table).
Implement 'Table' and 'Grid' toggles for the stock listing. The table must have a sticky header.

Integrate Shadcn primitives heavily for the sidebar filters (Carat sliders, Color multi-selects, etc.) but strip the default Vercel-look borders and apply the brand colors (Gold, Rose Gold, Electric Blue).
Include dummy data for live stock counters and table listings so the UI looks populated immediately.
The 'Request a Stone' form and 'Contact' page should look like premium concierge services.
Use provided Unsplash images for hero sections, ensuring they have an appropriate dark overlay (`bg-black/60`) to maintain text contrast.
